1.premise: Epstein's only objection to a party guest is that he might scare the children he is trafficking.
A man caught having sex with a vacuum cleaner reports the injury, not the crime.
Getting banned from a wholesome antiques show for violent threats over a bong collection treats drug paraphernalia as legitimate heirlooms.
Asking which of 'Aphex Twin' is more popular treats a solo artist's name as a literal description of two people.

lines.text: Did y'all see the email where Jeffrey Epstein's assistant asked him if they should invite
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Brian Reichel to the next big island party?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Epstein replied, "Hell no! Redman might frighten the kids!"
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: An Orlando man was arrested for indecent exposure after neighbors saw him having sex with a
lines.label: setup

lines.text: vacuum cleaner. When asked to comment on his arrest, the man said, "My balls are gone."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I got banned from Antique's Roadshow for issuing death threats after they refused to
lines.label: setup

lines.text: appraise my vintage bong collection. The Icecatcher's carved in pink ivory, you pompous prick!
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I read where A-Fex Twin now had more monthly listeners on YouTube than Taylor Swift. My
lines.label: setup

lines.text: My only question is, which twin is it?
lines.label: punchline
